CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS test_schema AUTHORIZATION admin_user;
CREATE SCHEMA schema_with_charset DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8 AUTHORIZATION user_role;
CREATE SCHEMA multi_elements_schema AUTHORIZATION admin_user CREATE TABLE sample_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE SCHEMA nested_schema AUTHORIZATION user_role CREATE VIEW sample_view AS SELECT * FROM sample_table;
CREATE SCHEMA complex_schema AUTHORIZATION hrm CREATE TABLE employee (id INT, name VARCHAR(255)); CREATE TABLE department (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE SCHEMA schema_with_path DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8 PATH schema1, schema2;
CREATE SCHEMA full_schema AUTHORIZATION hrm CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT); CREATE TABLE products (product_id INT);
CREATE SCHEMA permissions_schema AUTHORIZATION admin_role GRANT SELECT ON orders TO user_test;
CREATE SCHEMA test_schema AUTHORIZATION admin_user CREATE TABLE demo_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
